<script type="text/javascript">
jQuery(document).ready(function( $ ){
    // When the link is clicked, move the cursor to the relevant field
    $('body').on('click', 'a.go_to_required_field', function(event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        var target = $(this).data('target');
        $('input[name="' + target + '"], select[name="' + target + '"], textarea[name="' + target + '"]').focus();
    });

    // Check if all required fields are filled in when submitting the form
    $('form.checkout').on('checkout_place_order', function() {
        var isValid = true;
        var errorMessage = '<ul class="woocommerce-error" role="alert">';
        var errors = []; // Array to store the errors

        $(this).find('.woocommerce-billing-fields input[required], .woocommerce-billing-fields select[required], .woocommerce-billing-fields textarea[required]').each(function() {
            if ($.trim($(this).val()) === '') {
                isValid = false;
                var label = $(this).closest('p').find('label').text() || $(this).attr('placeholder');
                var target = $(this).attr('name');
                
                // Check if the error is already in the array
                if (errors.indexOf(target) === -1) {
                    errors.push(target); // Add the error to the array
                    errorMessage += '<li><a href="#" class="go_to_required_field" data-target="' + target + '">' + label.replace("*This field is required.", "this field is required.") + '</a></li>';
                }
            }
        });
        errorMessage += '</ul>';

        if (!isValid) {
            // Remove previous error messages
            $('.woocommerce-error').remove();
            // Add new error messages
            $('.woocommerce-notices-wrapper:first').prepend(errorMessage);
            $('.woocommerce-notices-wrapper .woocommerce-error li:first-child a').focus();

            // Smooth scroll to the top of the page where the error message is
            $('html, body').animate({
                scrollTop: $('.woocommerce-notices-wrapper').offset().top - 200
            }, 600);

            // Cancel the form submission
            return false;
        }

        // If all fields are valid, we allow the form to be submitted
        return true;
    });
});</script>

			<p><b>PW UNION MEMBERSHIP PROGRAM TERMS & CONDITIONS</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Updated: November 25, 2025</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Please read these Terms & Conditions (“Terms”, “Terms & Conditions”) before purchasing a PW Union Membership (the “Service”), a program offered and operated by1SIX1, Inc. dba Public Works (“us”, “we”, or “our”).</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Your access to and use of the Service is conditioned on your acceptance of and compliance with these Terms. These Terms apply to all users who access or use the Service.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">By accessing or using the Service you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms then you may not use the Service.</span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><b>CONDITIONS OF USE</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">By purchasing a PW Union Membership you are agreeing to receive the benefits specified under each membership tier located at <a href="http://www.publicsf.com/membership" target="_blank" rel="noopener">www.publicsf.com/membership</a> in exchange for the monthly or annual charge listed for each benefit tier. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Public Works has partnered with Loyalzoo to manage the PW Union Membership program, and Public Works uses Loyalzoo’s website <a href="https://mylty.co/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://mylty.co/</a> to manage your account. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">When you sign up for your PW Union membership you’ll receive a QR code that is unique to your name and membership tier, and can always be accessed by visiting</span> <a href="https://mylty.co/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">https://mylty.co/</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> or by clicking on the Access Your Loyalty Account link that is included with your monthly or annual payment receipt. This QR code must be shown at the venue along with a valid ID that matches the member’s name to use your PW Union member benefits.</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br />
</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br />
</span><span style="font-weight: 400;">The email address that you use to register will be used to send you your initial payment receipt and will include a link titled Access Your Loyalty Account that can be used to access your account online. The same link can be used to update your contact and payment information if needed, or you can go to</span> <a href="https://mylty.co/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">https://mylty.co/</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">. All payment receipts will come from noreply@loyalzoo.com.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Make sure you sign up with the first and last name that matches your ID, and an email address that can receive messages. For example, @</span><a href="http://privaterelay.appleid.com"><span style="font-weight: 400;">privaterelay.appleid.com</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> addresses do not accept PW Union emails and you will not receive payment receipts or important program news. If you need to update your name or email address, you can access your account and change it at </span><a href="https://mylty.co/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">https://mylty.co/</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">.</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br />
</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br />
</span><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you used a valid email address but didn’t get a payment receipt, it means your payment was declined and your QR code will not be active. If that happens, just go to your account at </span><a href="https://mylty.co/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span style="font-weight: 400;">https://mylty.co/</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> and try a different payment method or email <a href="mailto:union@publicsf.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">union@publicsf.com</a> for help.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">PW Union Memberships will automatically renew at the end of each monthly or annual billing cycle. To change your PW Union Membership plan email <a href="mailto:union@publicsf.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">union@publicsf.com</a> from the email address that is registered to your PW Union Membership account at least 72 hours before the start of your next billing cycle with Change Membership in the subject line. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you want to cancel your PW Union Membership and it started on or after July 1, 2025, visit <a href="https://mylty.co/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://mylty.co/</a> or click the Access Your Loyalty Account link at the bottom of the payment receipt emails that you receive from Loyalzoo. Then click the Card-On-File icon followed by the X next to your active plan.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you signed up for a PW Union Membership before July 1, 2025, email <a href="mailto:union@publicsf.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">union@publicsf.com</a> from the email address that is registered to your PW Union Membership account at least 72 hours before the start of your next billing cycle with Cancel Membership in the subject line. The cancellation will be processed automatically and you’ll receive a confirmation reply. You can also call (888) 416-8006 from the phone number registered to your account at least 72 hours before the start of your next billing cycle to request a cancellation, and you’ll be sent a message confirming the cancellation to your account email address. After cancelling, any remaining PW Union Membership plan benefits can be used until the current billing cycle ends.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Your benefits are for each billing cycle. There is no limit to the number of times you can use the skip the entry line, free coat check (there is a limit of one item per member), $1 off drinks (which includes both alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages), and early mezzanine access (when open) benefits, and for tiers with additional free shows and drinks, the number of shows and drinks resets based on your start date and your plan billing type. You will be given a unique PW Union wristband at entry to access your free coat check, $1 off drinks, and early mezzanine access benefits.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">For example, if you sign up on March 15 for a PW Union membership billed monthly, and your tier includes two free shows with one drink each, your membership will renew on April 15 and you will be eligible for another two shows and one drink at each one. If you sign up on March 15 for a PW Union Membership billed annually, and your tier includes the same benefits, you’ll receive two shows and one drink at each one for each month over a 12-month period that ends the following March 15.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The monthly PW Picks event will occur once per calendar month, and the date will be sent to the PW Union Membership account registered email address at least one week in advance. All members in all tiers will be eligible to enter the monthly PW Picks event at no charge, and they can also use their skip the line, free coat check, $1 off drinks, and early mezzanine access (if open) benefits at the monthly PW Picks event. PW Union members in the Night Boss tier can also bring one guest. No refunds will be given for any ticket purchased by a PW Union member to a PW Picks event, and if your membership starts after the PW Picks event has happened for that calendar month, the member will be eligible for this event starting the following calendar month.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Early mezzanine access will be for shows where the mezzanine is scheduled to be open, and member access will start one hour before the general public. Benefits are non-transferable, which means only the member can access the free shows, drinks, and coat check. PW Union Members are allowed to bring one person to join them in skipping the line, but the member must be present with this person for them to use this benefit. PW Union Members can use their $1 off drink discount to purchase drinks for other people, but the member must be the one making the purchase.</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br />
</span><span style="font-weight: 400;"><br />
</span><span style="font-weight: 400;">If your PW Union Membership tier includes additional free shows, this is for any event open to the public at Public Works. To use this benefit, all you need to do is arrive at Public Works with at least one unused event available and show the QR code at the door along with your ID and you’ll be admitted free of charge. Private events are not included. </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">In the event a show is expected to be sold out, there will be a limited number of PW Union Membership tickets reserved for eligible membership tiers on a first come, first serve basis that will be available via a members-only link sent the week of the show to the email address registered to your PW Union Membership account.  If you have one of these member-only tickets, you’ll show it along with your membership QR code and ID at the door.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Any changes to PW Union Membership benefits and monthly or annual charges will be sent from <a href="mailto:union@publicsf.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">union@publicsf.com</a> to the registered email address for your PW Union Membership with at least 30 days notice of any change. You will have the opportunity to cancel your PW Union Membership at no charge before any changes are effective.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">By purchasing a PW Union Membership you consent to receiving subsequent marketing and order-related emails from Public Works and our partner Loyalzoo. Your information and data will not be shared with any unrelated third party.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Public Works reserves the right to cancel a PW Union Membership in the event of any misuse of the Service and to do so without issuing a refund. Public Works also reserves the right to deny any initial PW Union Membership subscription, existing membership monthly or annual renewal, or resubscription at our discretion, in which case a refund will be issued.</span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><b>REFUND POLICY</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">All PW Union Membership sales are final and we do not offer refunds or returns for any reason except in the event of Service termination. If you have any questions about a PW Union Membership, please email <a href="mailto:union@publicsf.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">union@publicsf.com</a> before purchasing a membership.</span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><b>TERMINATION</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We may terminate or suspend access to the Service immediately due to unforeseen circumstances with full indemnity, and in the event this occurs, all PW Union Memberships already purchased will receive their full benefits until the final day of the current billing cycle.</span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><b>LINKS TO OTHER WEBSITES</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Our Service contains links to third party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by Public Works. Public Works has no control over, and assumes no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third party websites or services. You further acknowledge and agree that Public Works shall not be responsible or liable, directly or indirectly, for any damage or loss caused or alleged to be caused by or in connection with the use of or reliance on any such content, goods, or services available on or through any such websites or services.</span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><b>GOVERNING LAW</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the state of California in the United States without regard to its conflict of law provisions.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights. If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid or unenforceable by a court, the remaining provisions of these Terms will remain in effect. These Terms constitute the entire agreement between us regarding the Service, and supersede and replace any prior agreements we might have between us regarding the Service.</span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><b>CHANGES</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. You acknowledge and agree that it is your responsibility to review this site and these Terms periodically and to be aware of any modifications. By continuing to access or use the Service after those revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised Terms. If you do not agree to the new Terms, please stop using the Service by canceling your membership.</span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><b>CONTACT US</b></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you have any questions about these Terms, please email <a href="mailto:union@publicsf.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">union@publicsf.com</a>.</span></p>
